name: qwen3.5-4b/reasoning_pack
description: Candidate reasoning features for Qwen3.5-4B at residual stream layer 18. The SAE is trained by scripts/train_sae_qwen35.py — the first public SAE for the Qwen3.5 architecture. Features here are PLACEHOLDERS until the training run completes and auto-interp + validator produces real labels. Run mechreward.features.validator.validate_feature() against every entry before using this pack in a training run.

features.name: placeholder_until_trained
features.description: Placeholder entry. Will be replaced by real features after the SAE training run completes. See scripts/train_sae_qwen35.py and notebooks/train_qwen35_4b_sae.ipynb.

metadata.next_action: Run train_sae_qwen35.py with --tokens 200000000 and re-run auto-interp.

metadata.training_recipe: TopK SAE, k=64, d_sae=40960, 200M tokens from FineWeb-Edu
